title: Runtime AshGate Scope Repair / Decode Profile Event Seal
source_error: E0425 cannot find value gate in crates/runtime/src/engine/generation_runner.rs lines 334-335
root_cause: SALAD-01 event fields referenced gate.audit inside the generation thread after gate had gone out of scope and was not moved into the closure.
fix: Capture decode_profile and word_salad_guard inside the engine lock immediately after derive_gate, return them through the outer tuple, and emit them from closure-owned values.
